title: Place Signs Easy
description: Prevents the Sign edit GUI opening when placing Signs
body:
> **NOTE:** _This mod is packaged as part of [Great Big World](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-big-world) and was made a standalone mod so that players can enjoy it separately. Do not download both with the intent of using them together._

# Place Signs Easy
A simple mod that prevents the Sign edit GUI opening when placing Signs.

This is a nice change for those who are placing a large number of Signs, which is common for certain farms or traps.

> _This mod is free to use in modpacks with credit._
